author: doll-agent
content: Implemented prod, cumsum_flat, cumprod_flat, argmin, argmax, median, ptp, average (with optional weights), and anom on MaskedArray<T, D> in a new ferray-ma::extras module. cumsum/cumprod operate on the flat view (1-D output); axis variants follow the existing sum_axis/mean_axis pattern and can be added when needed. argmin/argmax return flat usize indices; raise InvalidValue when all elements are masked. average delegates to mean() when weights is None. Re-exported via ferray-ma lib.rs. ~10 unit tests cover skip-masked, mask propagation, all-masked error paths.
